name: @implementation/web-sdk_angular
description: Reference implementation of @contentful/optimization-web for Angular applications.

scripts.serve: pnpm serve:mocks && pnpm serve:app && until curl -s http://localhost:4200 > /dev/null 2>&1; do sleep 1; done
scripts.serve:mocks:stop: pm2 stop web-sdk_angular-mocks && pm2 delete web-sdk_angular-mocks
scripts.serve:app:stop: pm2 stop web-sdk_angular-app && pm2 delete web-sdk_angular-app
scripts.test:e2e:setup: pnpm serve:mocks && pnpm serve:app && until grep -q 'Application bundle generation complete' $HOME/.pm2/logs/web-sdk-angular-app-out.log 2>/dev/null; do sleep 1; done
scripts.test:e2e: pnpm test:e2e:setup && playwright test; E2E_RESULT=$?; pnpm serve:stop; exit $E2E_RESULT
scripts.test:e2e:ui: pnpm test:e2e:setup && playwright test --ui; E2E_RESULT=$?; pnpm serve:stop; exit $E2E_RESULT
